title: Atraphaxis ariana
taxonomy: Atraphaxis ariana is a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family, Amaranthaceae. It is native to the Middle East and Central Asia. The classification of Atraphaxis ariana includes its kingdom as Plantae, and its classification within the plant kingdom as a dicotyledonous angiosperm. Further classification places Atraphaxis ariana in the order Caryophyllales, and then in the family Amaranthaceae. Atraphaxis ariana is also known by the synonyms Atraphaxis spinosa var. ariana and Atraphaxis ariana is a synonym of Atraphaxis spinosa.
